response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and a broad range of technical experience, but his background is heavily skewed toward web and mobile technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React) rather than the C++ and industrial automation focus required for this role. While he has some exposure to low-latency systems and embedded development, his lack of recent, in-depth C++ experience and limited explicit industrial cybersecurity or cloud platform work are notable gaps.
strengths: Extensive experience with scalable, event-driven architectures and distributed systems (e.g., micro-services at Sociomantic, GISCollective platform).
Proven leadership in mentoring, technical documentation, and cross-functional collaboration (e.g., workshops, code katas, open-source contributions).
Strong problem-solving and adaptability, with a track record of learning and applying diverse technologies (e.g., DLang, Kubernetes, AI-agent tooling).
concerns: Limited recent hands-on experience with C++ and STL, which are core requirements for this role.
No explicit mention of industrial cybersecurity standards (e.g., IEC 62443) or Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) practices in the resume.
Primary expertise lies in web/mobile development (TypeScript, Node.js, React), with minimal alignment to IoT or industrial automation protocols (e.g., OPC UA, Modbus).
